query: SELECT authorName, s3AvatarUrl FROM author_profiles WHERE authorName LIKE '%Bren%' OR authorName LIKE '%Brown%' OR authorName LIKE '%Grant%' OR authorName LIKE '%Gladwell%' ORDER BY authorName;
